name: make-it-a-gif
title: Make It a GIF
description: Turns the image you copied into a gif

commands.name: convert-to-gif
commands.title: Convert to GIF
commands.description: Converts images from the clipboard into a gif

commands.name: speech-bubble-gif
commands.title: Speech Bubble GIF
commands.description: Adds a speech bubble overlay and converts to GIF

preferences.name: maxBubbleHeightPercent
preferences.title: Max Bubble Height
preferences.description: Maximum height of the speech bubble as a percentage of the image height

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: starnumber12046
